title: helenium undulatum
intro: Helenium undulatum, also known as the rocky mountain sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a diaphoretic, helping to induce sweating and relieve fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium undulatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as the common cold and allergies, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin irritations. Helenium undulatum can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
